linkedin_profile.headline: Graduate Researcher at the University of Maryland focused on survey methodology, trustworthy AI, and computational social science.
linkedin_profile.headline_short: Graduate Researcher at the University of Maryland focused on survey methodology, trustworthy AI...
linkedin_profile.about_full: Graduate researcher building rigorous measurement systems for AI-enabled research. Current work spans survey methodology, causal inference, geospatial epidemiology, statistical modeling, and trustworthy automation for public-data infrastructure. Published survey research in peer-reviewed venues and presented transformer-based sentiment analysis work at AAPOR.
linkedin_profile.about_short: Graduate researcher building rigorous measurement systems for AI-enabled research. Current work spans survey methodology, causal inference, geospatial epidemiology, statistical modeling, and trustworthy automation for public-data infrastructure.

linkedin_experience.organization: Social Data Science Center, University of Maryland
linkedin_experience.description_full: Engineered Python automation over the CKAN REST API to manage the lifecycle of 18 datasets while maintaining 100% resource accessibility. Reworked repository taxonomy into hierarchical thematic groups, improving search discoverability by 35%. Reduced manual metadata maintenance by 90% through schema-safe bulk update tooling.
linkedin_experience.description_short: Engineered Python automation over the CKAN REST API to manage the lifecycle of 18 datasets while maintaining 100% resource accessibility.
bullets: Engineered Python automation over the CKAN REST API to manage the lifecycle of 18 datasets while maintaining 100% resource accessibility.
Reworked repository taxonomy into hierarchical thematic groups, improving search discoverability by 35%.
Reduced manual metadata maintenance by 90% through schema-safe bulk update tooling.

linkedin_experience.organization: Institute for Social Research, University of Michigan
linkedin_experience.description_full: Built a production geospatial integration pipeline spanning 129,572 U.S. census tracts and 3 RUCA strata. Recovered 28.6% baseline missingness while achieving full broadband data completeness. Designed a QA framework that surfaced 15% spatial-clustering violations and strengthened temporal completeness checks.
linkedin_experience.description_short: Built a production geospatial integration pipeline spanning 129,572 U.S. census tracts and 3 RUCA strata. Recovered 28.6% baseline missingness while achieving full broadband data completeness.

linkedin_experience.description_full: Supported SURV735 on data privacy and confidentiality for 23 graduate students. Reengineered Canvas LMS workflows for 10+ instructors and 125+ students, improving setup speed and course satisfaction.
